title: peliosanthes choriandra
intro: Peliosanthes choriandra, also known as the Chinese foxglove or fox grape vine, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Peliosanthes choriandra is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
